untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) tracking momentum persistence over 2+ consecutive periods, (2) volume comparison to SMA_20 (not available; vol_ratio_20 compares to SMA_20 but exact 40% threshold mapping is ambiguous), (3) medium-term holding period logic (3-12 months) with conditional weighting based on intended horizon (3+ years). The context-dependent direction and horizon-specific volume weighting cannot be expressed as static entry/exit conditions.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using returns > 0 for positive momentum, vol_ratio_20 > 1.4 for volume threshold (matching the 1.4x multiplier vs MA), and exit on negative returns. However, the core insight—that volume persistence differs by holding period and should be weighted differently for 3-12 month vs 3+ year horizons—requires dynamic, time-dependent logic not expressible in this static rule format. The 2-period confirmation requirement also cannot be captured without lookback history tracking.
